home_title: A clean starting point for your next product.
home_subtitle: This template keeps the infrastructure: TanStack Start, Better Auth, Prisma, PostgreSQL, oRPC, Tailwind, i18n, and an Android TWA shell.
public_rpc_description: The health check proves the oRPC server route is wired.
protected_rpc_description: Sign in to exercise the authenticated API example.
privacy_policy_seo_description: Privacy policy placeholder for the application template.
privacy_policy_subtitle: Replace this page before launching a real product.
privacy_policy_intro: This template includes a neutral privacy policy scaffold. Update it to match your product, data flows, service providers, and jurisdiction before production use.
privacy_policy_information_we_collect_bo: The template is wired for account data such as name, email address, authentication sessions, and technical request data. Your product may collect more data once you add features.
privacy_policy_how_we_use_information_bo: Use this section to describe how your app provides its service, secures accounts, communicates with users, and improves reliability.
privacy_policy_service_providers_body: Document the hosting, database, authentication, Google Sign-In, analytics, email, storage, and payment providers your final product uses.
privacy_policy_your_choices_body: Explain how users can access, update, export, or delete their data, and how they can contact you for privacy requests.
privacy_policy_contact_body: Replace this contact address with the support or privacy inbox for your project.
accessibility_statement_seo_description: Accessibility statement placeholder for the application template.
accessibility_statement_subtitle: Replace this page with your product-specific accessibility statement.
accessibility_statement_intro: This template includes accessible primitives and a neutral statement scaffold. Audit your final product before launch.
accessibility_statement_commitment_body: Describe your commitment to inclusive access and the standard your product aims to meet.
accessibility_statement_adjustments_body: List the concrete adjustments in your app, such as semantic structure, keyboard support, readable contrast, and responsive layouts.
accessibility_statement_limitations_body: Document known accessibility gaps and the plan for addressing them.
accessibility_statement_contact_body: Replace this contact address with the inbox that should receive accessibility feedback.
unexpected_error_occurred: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again or return to the home page.
auth_forgot_password_description: Enter your email to receive a password reset link.
auth_check_your_email: Check your email for the password reset link.
auth_delete_account_description: Permanently delete your account and associated data.
auth_invalid_reset_password_token: This reset link is incomplete or expired.
auth_reset_password_invalid_help: Open the password reset email again and use the newest link.
auth_reset_password_description: Choose a new password for your account.
auth_sign_up_description: Create an account for this starter app.
auth_redirecting_to_sign_in: Redirecting you back to sign in.
settings_profile_description: Update the profile details stored with your account.
settings_change_email_description: Change the email address used for sign in.
settings_security_description: Security controls for the signed-in account.
settings_set_password_description: Add a password to this account.
settings_linked_accounts_description: Connect and disconnect the social sign-in providers available to your account.
